highlights: Service Catalog, Calendar fixes, Customer Profile CRUD

sections.title: New Features
items: Service Catalog page with two-panel layout: service groups sidebar + paginated services table
ProductCategories API with full CRUD (11 groups, 155 services from database)
Products API with Create/Update/Delete endpoints
Calendar Day view redesigned as card grid layout with status badges
Customer Profile: Add deposit and make payment fully connected to database
Obsidian Brain integration for project context

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Calendar timezone: UTC dates now correctly convert to Vietnam time (UTC+7)
All 3 calendar views (Overview, Week, Day) now consistently show 5 appointments
Appointment creation: added missing fields (time, isrepeatcustomer, isnotreatment)
Appointment API accepts both camelCase and lowercase field names
CustomerBalance now queries dbo.partners instead of missing public.customers
Added 'scheduled' to valid appointment states
Auth middleware: skip permission check for dev-mode non-UUID employeeId
Customer profile refreshes after editing phone/info

sections.title: Removed
items: Removed fake placeholder stats from Employee Profile (Patients Served, Avg Rating, etc.)
VersionDisplay hidden in production to prevent React #310 error

sections.title: Testing
items: 6 Playwright E2E tests for Customer Profile CRUD — all passing
TC1: Edit phone, TC2: Create appointment, TC3: Edit appointment
TC4: Add service record, TC5: Add deposit, TC6: Make payment

sections.title: Features
items: Docker Compose deployment with PostgreSQL, Express API, and nginx SPA
Google Places address autocomplete integration
Production environment configuration (.env.development / .env.production)
